name: Alpine Glacier Terrain Following Mission
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist contracted to map the rapid retreat of the Aletsch Glacier in the Swiss Alps. Because the glacier sits on a steep incline, you must use terrain following to ensure the drone follows the topography. Refer to the project briefing at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/glacier_briefing.txt for full details. Create a survey mission near 46.435 N, 8.020 E with a flight altitude of 50 m AGL and 80% frontal and side overlaps. Save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/glacier_survey.plan.
